data_sources.note: Midland National Oak Elite ADV registered index-linked variable annuity. Issued by Midland National Life Insurance Company (Sammons Financial Group). RIA/fee-based distribution channel (no surrender schedule in the ADV share class). Indicative rate sheet updates weekly.

Midland Advisory / Dimensional Fund Advisors collaboration announced May 2025: custom index RILA solution using Dimensional active ETFs (Dimensional US Equity Core Plus Index). Oak Elite ADV is the RIA-channel RILA wrapper.

Cap rate (1-yr S&P 500 PTP with 10% buffer) and 6-yr participation rate are public-range estimates pending broker-portal rate sheet access. Surrender schedule is empty consistent with the ADV (fee-based RIA) share class — Midland confirms there is no surrender period on the advisory variant.
Midland National Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A+ (Superior).
